title: Missing My Flight | #shorts
full_text: mom mom the security line was so long the traffic was so long we're coming we're coming please tell them to hold the gate please tell them to hold the gate no no take your time I leave too early BR mom the flight's starting now please tell theate that's okay I'm sure there's another flight in 2 minutes don't even worry about it take your time I leave 2 hours too early I'm crazy you know go talk to your therapist now tell your therapist how bad I am bye
